steps.title: Emphasize the event history
steps.content: The question asks how long Moreau's sport has been a Paralympic event. The key note is that swimming has been an event at the Paralympic Games since 1960, so the best choice must foreground that date.

steps.title: Reject career-only details
steps.content: A and D emphasize Moreau's career span or medal totals, not how long swimming has been included. B defines the Paralympic Games but omits the sport's history. The remaining choice states that swimming has been a Paralympic event since 1960. The answer is C.
